market_scan.notes: Queried Optimal SQL fallback for 2026-05-01 across MLB, NBA, and NHL events. Expanded game odds/projections and player prop odds/projections; applied win_prob >= 50%, stale-line guardrails of plus odds <= +1000 and EV <= +500%, then de-duplicated by stable pick id.

picks.reasoning: Why this made the card: Deandre Ayton points Over 11.5 is a player prop priced at Polymarket +213. That price is break-even at 31.9%, while the model has it at 51.9% — a +20.0 percentage-point cushion and +62.5% expected value. Projection support: 11.83 median (points) versus the listed line Over 11.5. Model note: Model median 11.83 vs Over 11.5; estimated hit rate 51.9%. Context: matchup LAL @ HOU; team LAL. Risk note: this is still a probabilistic edge, not a lock; it stays on the card because it cleared the 50%+ win-probability rule, stale-line guardrails, and ranked by EV.
